stem: Of 50 districts, 32 administer a written exam. Of those, 4 districts do not administer an oral exam. To the nearest tenth of a percent, what percent of districts with a written exam do not administer an oral exam?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. Of the 32 districts that administer a written exam, 4 do not administer an oral exam. The percentage is 4/32 = 0.125, or 12.5%.

Choice B (8.0%) is 4/50. Choice C (14.3%) uses 28 instead of 32. Choice D is the count itself read as a percent.
